# Polygon Arbitrage Bot — llms.txt (post full audit)

This file helps AI assistants discover the most important documentation for the high-frequency, **strictly flash-loan-only** DEX arbitrage bot on Polygon (chain 137).

## Primary Context (read in order)

- AGENTS.md — Architecture, flash-loan invariants, hot-path rules (no sync I/O in 200ms, use RpcManager), key commands, arb-tx-tools debugging loop, testing patterns.
- skill.md — Capabilities, workflows, AI integration (arb-tx-tools is primary).
- README.md — High-level overview + quickstart.
- TODO.md — Remaining tasks.
- src/DUPLICATION_AUDIT.md — History of cleanups (strategy removal, tax deadcode, keying fixes, consolidations etc.).

## Current Architecture (post cleanups)

- src/cli/ (main.ts, arb_only.ts) — entry, flags (--tui), wiring.
- src/config/ — Zod + loader + defaults + addresses.
- src/rpc/manager.ts — **Single source** for all RPC (read/execution/FastLane/WS + scheduler).
- src/pipeline/ —  graph, finder (DFS), simulator (with prebuilt edges + minimal+impact combined), fetcher (dirty/updated sets), rates (seed+focus incremental), pipeline (ternary + holders), instrumenter.
- src/orchestrator/ — boot (wires ctx, no more getPools), pass_loop (HF/LF/discovery, dirty graph updates, single rates point, mempool signals, lag degrade, budget tripwire), runner, shutdown, status_writer. loop.ts is now tiny DI surface only (old dead runPipeline long gone).
- src/services/execution/ — thin service + candidate (now uses consistent identity routeKey), builder/calldata (single norm for hash), dryrun, gas, nonce, quarantine, receipt, submit, tracker.
- src/services/mempool/ — pending tx decode + signals.
- src/infra/ — hypersync (resilient anchors, graphql), rpc (factory etc), resilience (circuits, reorg on LF only, tier, monitor), garbage (single source for isGarbage*/factories + persistence + one-time), observability.
- src/core/ — math/* (pure AMM sims + optimized V3 tick cache), assessment (profit/risk, always flash fee), constants (BPS + reexports garbage), types, utils (bigint consolidated).
- src/tui/ — decoupled event bus + state/renderer.
- hyperindex/ — Envio indexer (dynamic factories, effects-first + preload + isPreload guards, no-op hot events, hot-bias, pacing). Own token_registry for decimals only.
- sol/src/ArbExecutor.sol — flash-only enforcement + custom errors. Tests in sol/test/.

## AI Tooling & Skills (primary for agents)

This env is AI-first with custom skills (in .grok/skills/ and .claude/skills/), MCP servers, Context7, lspmux for language servers, and graphify.

**arb-tx-tools (core debugging skill, auto-triggers on relevant keywords or /arb-tx-tools)**
- Direct CLI: `bun .grok/skills/arb-tx-tools/scripts/{simulator.ts, abicoder.ts, log-tailer.ts}`
- MCP: registered as "arb-tx-tools" (bun run scripts/arb-tx-tools.ts) — uses shared modules from scripts/arb-tx-tools/ (consolidated AnvilManager, abi-registry, LogCapture)
- Loop: log-tailer → simulator (Anvil or Alchemy MCP via search_tool + use_tool) → abicoder decode-revert → fix → verify.
- See .grok/skills/arb-tx-tools/SKILL.md for full.

**Other skills**
- .grok/skills/ : arb-tx-tools (main), help, create-skill, best-of-n, check-work, execute-plan, etc. Also pptx, docx, xlsx, imagine for assets.
- .claude/skills/ : many Envio indexer skills (indexer-schema, indexer-handlers, indexer-performance, indexer-traces, indexer-factory, indexer-blocks, etc.), migrate-from-subgraph, graphify.
- Use `/graphify` for any input (code, docs) → knowledge graph.
- Use skills via slash commands or auto.

**MCP servers (registered in .opencode/opencode.json and system)**
- arb-tx-tools (local)
- sequential-thinking, fetch, memory, postgres (for Hasura), envio_docs (remote)
- Others like alchemy, coingecko, dexscreener, context7, grok_com_github, puppeteer, etc. (use search_tool first to discover schemas, then use_tool).
- Use via the agent's MCP integration.

**lspmux**
- Muxes language servers (TS, Solidity, GraphQL, YAML, Bash, JSON, TOML) for consistent code intelligence.
- Config: lspmux/config.toml (listen 127.0.0.1:27631)
- Bins in lspmux/bin/ proxy to node_modules versions.
- Useful for AI coding assistants (opencode, grok build, etc.) to query LSPs for symbols, defs, refs, hovers without conflicts. Configure your AI tool to use the mux port/client if supported.

**Other AI integrations**
- Context7 for up-to-date lib docs (use resolve-library-id then query-docs).
- graphify for codebase graphs (run via skill or /graphify).
- Use `bun run check` often; direct `bunx vitest` for tests.
- For Polygon/Envio: official MCPs + Context7 `llmstxt/polygon_technology_llms_txt`.

See .grok/skills/*/SKILL.md and system MCP announcements for details. Always start with AGENTS.md + skill.md + llms.txt.

## Indexing

- hyperindex/config.yaml + schema.graphql + src/{handlers,effects,utils}/ — follow the Envio skills patterns (contractRegister + where hot bias, effects early + isPreload return, pacing, no hot state writes).
- Bot consumes via discover + buildStateCacheFromGraphQL + fetcher for live.

## Key Commands (current, simplified package.json)

- `bun run tui` — full bot with TUI (recommended for monitoring)
- `bun run start` — full bot headless
- `bun run arb` / `bun run arbt` — arb-only mode (external HyperIndex, with/without TUI)
- `bun run hi` — run HyperIndex by itself
- `bun run check` — typecheck + lint + prettier (consolidated)
- `bun run fix` — auto-fix lint + format
- AI tools: direct from .grok/skills/arb-tx-tools/scripts/ or via MCP
- Tests: `bunx vitest run` (direct)
- HyperIndex internal: `cd hyperindex && bun run ...` (dev, codegen, etc.)

No more --cleanup (dummy removed).

## Other

- src/config/addresses.ts + scripts/pools.json (anchors, resilient load)
- No strategy/ , no tax TokenRegistry (fully removed as un-wired dead), no dangling getPools.
- All hot path uses single sources (createEdgesForPool, computeMaticRates with seed, etc.).

## For Polygon/Envio accuracy

Use Context7 (polygon_technology_llms_txt) or official MCPs instead of guessing.

Trimmed: old superpowers/plans/specs (detailed past phases), graphify-out caches, debug_*.log, test_bearer*, GEMINI.md, optimization reports (all items addressed in audits).

This project follows a "AI-first development" philosophy. Always prefer using the provided custom skills (especially arb-tx-tools) over raw terminal commands when debugging on-chain behavior.
